_comment: The 'deal menu'. Lena may ONLY offer concessions from this list, and only when the stated condition is met. She cannot invent discounts. Dollar amounts spoken by the agent are validated against this file plus listed rents by the guardrail.

concessions.condition: Caller books a viewing within the next 7 days

concessions.offer: Half month free on a 12-month lease
concessions.condition: Caller mentions comparing with another property or hesitates on price for a 2BR unit

concessions.offer: Second parking spot free for the first 3 months

hard_limits.rent_negotiation: Listed rent is never negotiable by the agent. Requests for lower rent are logged and escalated to the human leasing manager.
